# Tank Documentation

> Security-first package manager for AI agent skills. Tank provides cryptographic verification, runtime permission enforcement, and a 6-stage security scanning pipeline to prevent credential exfiltration, prompt injection, and supply chain attacks.

Tank is a security-first package manager for AI agent skills. It enforces versioning, lockfiles, permissions, code signing, and static analysis to prevent supply chain attacks.

## Key Resources

- [API Reference](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/api): REST API endpoints for Tank registry
- [CLI Reference](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/cli): Complete reference for all tank CLI commands
- [Getting Started](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/getting-started): Install Tank, authenticate, and verify your first working flow.
- [Tank Documentation](https://tankpkg.dev/docs): Start here for setup, publishing, installation, API, and self-hosting.
- [Installing Skills](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/installing): Install, update, remove, and verify skills safely.
- [Publish Your First Skill](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/publish-first-skill): Step-by-step guide to publish your first AI agent skill to Tank registry
- [Publishing Skills](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/publishing): Build, validate, and publish skills with accurate metadata and minimal permissions.
- [Secure AI Skills Checklist](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/security-checklist): Security best practices checklist for publishing safe AI agent skills
- [Self-Host in 15 Minutes](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/self-host-quickstart): Deploy your own Tank registry and security scanner on-premise
- [Self-Hosting](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/self-hosting): Repository-aligned runbook for self-hosting Tank.

## Optional

- [Skills Registry](https://tankpkg.dev/skills): Browse all published skills
- [Self-Host Guide](https://tankpkg.dev/docs/self-hosting): Deploy on your infrastructure

## Constraints

- All skills require explicit permission declarations
- Security scan required before publish (6-stage pipeline)
- Cryptographic signature verification on install
- No wildcard permissions allowed

## Full Export

See [llms-full.txt](https://tankpkg.dev/llms-full.txt) for complete documentation content.
